title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Indifi Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Indifi Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Indifi Technologies family as a Backend Developer in Ghaziabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Indifi Technologies:
Indifi Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indifi Technologies!
